title: Dineout is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Dineout is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Dineout are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dineout:
Dineout is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
